summary: iOS Scene Delegate Flutter Plugin Registration Update

message.content: @lib/views/pages/home/sessions/session_details/recording/components/rotation_container.dart では、SessionDetailsPage から受け取った AICoachReportContent をそのまま表示する。これを変更したい。  AI Report のタブを開く度に、 @lib/data/repositories/api_server_repository.dart の getAIReport から AI Report のデータを取得するようにしたい。

content.text:
このタスクを理解しました。現在の実装では `AICoachReportContent` が `SessionDetailsPage` から渡されていますが、これを AI Report タブを開くたびに `getAIReport` で取得するように変更します。

まず、現在のコードベース構造を確認させてください。
SessionDetailsPage の構造を確認させてください。

    25→class AICoachReportContainer extends HookConsumerWidget {

    27→    required this.teamId,

    35→  final String teamId;
    36→  final String sessionId;
    37→  final Player? player;
    38→  final AICoachReport? report;
    39→  final void Function(Session updatedSession)? onSessionUpdated;
    40→
    41→  @override
    42→  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    43→    final theme = Theme.of(context);
    44→    final colorScheme = theme.colorScheme;
    45→    final sectionTitleStyle = theme.textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(
    46→      fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
    47→      color: colorScheme.onSurface,
    48→    );
    49→    final sectionSubtitleStyle = theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(
    50→      color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
    51→    );
    52→
    53→    if (report == null) {
    54→      return EmptyContainer(
    55→        teamId: teamId,
    56→        sessionId: sessionId,
    57→        player: player,
    58→        onSessionUpdated: onSessionUpdated,
    59→      );
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    final generationState = report!.status;
    63→
    64→    if (generationState == AICoachReportStatus.failed) {
    65→      return ReportGenerationStatusContent(
    66→        teamId: teamId,
    67→        sessionId: sessionId,
    68→        player: player,
    69→        title: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_failed_title,
    70→        description:
    71→            context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_failed_description,
    72→        buttonLabel: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_retry_button,
    73→        onSessionUpdated: onSessionUpdated,
    74→      );
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    if (generationState == AICoachReportStatus.cancelled) {
    78→      return ReportGenerationStatusContent(
    79→        teamId: teamId,
    80→        sessionId: sessionId,
    81→        player: player,
    82→        title: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_canceled_title,
    83→        description:
    84→            context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_canceled_description,
    85→        buttonLabel: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_restart_button,
    86→        onSessionUpdated: onSessionUpdated,
    87→      );
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    if (generationState == AICoachReportStatus.accepted) {
    91→      return const _ReportGenerationProcessingView();
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    if (generationState == AICoachReportStatus.completed &&
    95→        report?.content == null) {
    96→      return ReportGenerationStatusContent(
    97→        teamId: teamId,
    98→        sessionId: sessionId,
    99→        player: player,
   100→        title: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_failed_title,

   102→            context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_failed_description,
   103→        buttonLabel: context.l10n.ai_coach_report__generation_retry_button,
   104→        onSessionUpdated: onSessionUpdated,
   105→      );
   106→    }
   107→
   108→    final content = report!.content!;
   109→
   110→    return SingleChildScrollView(
   111→      child: Column(
   112→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
   113→        children: [
   114→          if (content.pitchFeatures != null) ...[
   115→            PitchFeaturesExpansionTile(
   116→              pitchFeatures: content.pitchFeatures!,
   117→              params: report!.params,
   118→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   119→            ),
   120→            const Gap(8),
   121→          ],
   122→          if (content.prosCons != null) ...[
   123→            ProsConsExpansionTile(
   124→              prosCons: content.prosCons!,
   125→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   126→              subtitleStyle: sectionSubtitleStyle,
   127→            ),
   128→            const Gap(8),
   129→          ],
   130→          if (content.countRecommendations != null) ...[
   131→            CountStrategyExpansionTile(
   132→              entries: content.countRecommendations!,
   133→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   134→              subtitleStyle: sectionSubtitleStyle,
   135→            ),
   136→            const Gap(8),
   137→          ],
   138→          if (content.strikeoutStrategies != null) ...[
   139→            StrikeoutStrategyExpansionTile(
   140→              strategies: content.strikeoutStrategies!,
   141→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   142→              subtitleStyle: sectionSubtitleStyle,
   143→            ),
   144→            const Gap(8),
   145→          ],
   146→          if (content.leftyStrategies != null) ...[
   147→            LeftyStrategyExpansionTile(
   148→              strategies: content.leftyStrategies!,
   149→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   150→              subtitleStyle: sectionSubtitleStyle,
   151→            ),
   152→            const Gap(8),
   153→          ],
   154→          if (content.pitchZones != null) ...[
   155→            PitchZonesExpansionTile(
   156→              items: content.pitchZones!,
   157→              titleStyle: sectionTitleStyle,
   158→              subtitleStyle: sectionSubtitleStyle,
   159→            ),
   160→            const Gap(8),
   161→          ],
   162→          if (content.newPitches != null) ...[
   163→            NewPitchExpansionTile(
   164→              proposals: content.newPitches!,
   165→              params: report!.params,
   166→            ),
   167→            const Gap(8),
   168→          ],
   169→          if (content.actionPlans != null) ...[
   170→            ActionPlansExpansionTile(
